n: Barad Guldur: The End of the Nightmare

steps.t: Belvaer stands below at Dol Guldur. You should speak with Belvaer and show him the remnants of the Nazgûl you slew.
Celeborn is in Caras Galadhon, his fair Elven-home in Lothlórien. Belvaer gave you a coin to present to Celeborn along with the tattered robes of the …
